admin.noEligibleUsers: No eligible users to delete (admins and deleted users excluded)
admin.bulkDeleteUsersDescription: This action cannot be undone. Users will be removed from Clerk.
admin.payloadMustBeObject: Feature payload must be a JSON object
admin.rewardPayloadObject: Reward payload must be a JSON object
admin.audienceRequired: Audience is required for AI generation
admin.keyPointsRequired: Key points are required for AI generation
admin.errorDuringSoftDelete: An error occurred during soft delete
admin.errorDuringBulkSoftDelete: An error occurred during bulk soft delete
admin.errorDuringHardDelete: An error occurred during hard delete
admin.errorDuringBulkRestore: An error occurred during bulk restore
admin.errorDuringEmbeddingSync: An error occurred during embedding sync
admin.errorDuringEmbeddingSyncAll: An error occurred during embedding sync all
admin.aiSummaryFailed: Failed to start AI summary generation
admin.softDeleteUserDescription: The user will be marked as deleted and hidden from active lists. They can be restored later.
admin.hardDeleteUserDescription: This will remove the user from the database and Clerk. This action cannot be undone.
admin.createLevelRewardDescription: Define a reward granted when users reach a specific level
admin.createFeatureUnlockDescription: Define a feature that unlocks when users reach a specific level
admin.configPageDescription: Key-value config (superadmin only). Used by backend e.g. clerk_auto_remove_email_prefix.

reportDetail.contextSnapshotDescription: Call and behavior context at the time of report
reportDetail.adminActionsDescription: Update report status and add admin notes

configForm.dialogSetDescription: Key should be snake_case. Value: string, number, boolean, or JSON.
configForm.dialogUpdateDescription: Change the value. Key cannot be edited.
configForm.unsetDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this configuration key?
configForm.unsetDescriptionWithKey: Remove key "{key}"? This cannot be undone.

broadcastForm.aiWriterDescription: Generate a draft for the notification message.
broadcastForm.keyPointsPlaceholder: e.g. what happened, why it matters, what to do next
broadcastForm.cardDescription: Save to in-app notifications or send a push-only announcement.
broadcastForm.deliveryPushOnlyHint: One-time push, not saved in app.

admin.broadcastHistoryDescription: Recent broadcasts and who created them.

interestTagForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide a brief context for this tag...
interestTagForm.visibilityHint: Allow users to see and select this tag
interestTagForm.modalDescription: Interest tags help the system recommend more accurate content to users.

levelRewardModal.description: Define rewards that are automatically granted when users reach specific levels.
levelRewardModal.payloadJsonHint: JSON object containing reward-specific data. Must be valid JSON.

featureUnlockModal.description: Define features that unlock when users reach specific levels.
featureUnlockModal.payloadJsonHint: JSON object containing feature-specific configuration. Must be valid JSON.

streakExpModal.description: Define EXP bonus multipliers that apply when users have streaks within specific ranges.
streakExpModal.multiplierHint: Multiplier applied to EXP. Must be at least 1.0 (e.g., 1.50 = 50% bonus).

levelRewardCreatePage.payloadIntro: JSON object with reward-specific data. Add an optional image below to store a media descriptor (resource_type, resource_key, content_type) in the payload.
levelRewardCreatePage.mediaHint: Upload an image to attach an S3-backed media descriptor to the payload. Accepted: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP. Max 5MB.

featureUnlockCreatePage.payloadIntro: JSON object with feature-specific configuration. Add an optional image below to store a media descriptor (resource_type, resource_key, content_type) in the payload.
featureUnlockCreatePage.mediaHint: Upload an image to attach an S3-backed media descriptor to the payload. Accepted: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP. Max 5MB.

embedding.compareDescription: Compare embedding similarity between two users.
embedding.findSimilarDescription: Find users with similar embeddings to the selected user.

avatar_frame.title: avatar_frame reward
avatar_frame.description: Unlocks an avatar frame at the given level. Users can equip it on their profile.
avatar_frame.mediaNote: Upload an image above to automatically add a media object with resource_type "s3" and resource_key. Media is optional; you can also use resource_type "static" with a resource_path for app-bundled assets.
avatar_frame.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app-bundled asset (use resource_path). "s3" = file stored in S3 (use resource_key; populated when you upload).

badge.title: badge reward
badge.description: Unlocks a badge displayed on the user profile or in activity.
badge.mediaNote: Upload an image to attach an S3-backed media descriptor. The payload will reference the file via resource_type and resource_key. Media is optional.
badge.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app-bundled path. "s3" = uploaded file (resource_key points to the S3 object).

currency.title: currency reward
currency.description: Grants in-app currency when the user reaches this level.
currency.mediaNote: Currency rewards typically do not use media. If you need an icon, you can add an optional media descriptor with resource_type "static" or "s3".
currency.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app path. "s3" = uploaded file. Usually not used for currency.

cosmetic_unlock.title: cosmetic_unlock reward
cosmetic_unlock.description: Unlocks a cosmetic item (theme, border, effect) at the given level.
cosmetic_unlock.mediaNote: Upload an image to add an S3-backed media descriptor. The payload references the file via resource_type and resource_key. Media is optional.
cosmetic_unlock.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app-bundled. "s3" = uploaded file (resource_key set when you upload).

genericReward.title: Reward payload
genericReward.description: Use a JSON object with keys relevant to your reward type. Structure depends on how the app consumes this reward.
genericReward.mediaNote: Media is optional. Upload an image above to add a media descriptor (resource_type "s3", resource_key) automatically. For app-bundled assets use resource_type "static" and resource_path.
genericReward.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app-bundled path. "s3" = file stored in S3 (resource_key points to the object; set automatically when you upload).

reaction_types.title: reaction_types
reaction_types.description: Configures which reaction types are available. The payload is configuration, not a boolean toggle; the app reads these values at runtime.
reaction_types.mediaNote: Reaction types usually do not use media. If a custom reaction needs an icon, add an optional media object with resource_type "s3" or "static".
reaction_types.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app path. "s3" = uploaded file. Optional for this feature.

favorite_limit.title: favorite_limit
favorite_limit.description: Configures how many favorites a user can have. The payload holds the numeric limit and any extra options.
favorite_limit.mediaNote: favorite_limit does not use media. Media is optional and only needed if you add custom UI assets (resource_type "static" or "s3").
favorite_limit.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" or "s3" only if you attach a custom asset; otherwise omit media.

streak_freeze.title: streak_freeze
streak_freeze.description: Configures streak freeze behavior: how many freezes, how to earn or spend them. The payload is configuration, not a simple on/off.
streak_freeze.mediaNote: Optional: add media with resource_type "s3" or "static" if you need an icon for the freeze in the UI.
streak_freeze.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app path. "s3" = uploaded file. Optional.

ui_customization.title: ui_customization
ui_customization.description: Configures UI customization options (themes, layout, compact mode). Different keys can require different payload shapes.
ui_customization.mediaNote: Upload an image to attach an S3-backed asset (e.g. custom theme preview). The payload will reference it via resource_type and resource_key. Media is optional.
ui_customization.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app-bundled. "s3" = uploaded file (resource_key set when you upload).

genericFeature.title: Feature payload
genericFeature.description: feature_payload is configuration the app reads for this feature, not a boolean. Use a JSON object; the shape depends on the feature.
genericFeature.mediaNote: Media is optional. Upload an image to add an S3-backed descriptor (resource_type, resource_key). The payload will reference the file; you can also use resource_type "static" for app paths.
genericFeature.resourceTypeNote: resource_type: "static" = app path. "s3" = uploaded file (resource_key filled when you upload).

users.clerkUserIdCopied: Clerk user ID copied to clipboard

blockedUsers.unblockDescription: Are you sure you want to unblock {name}? They will be able to match with you again.

levelFeatureUnlocks.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the level feature unlock.

levelRewards.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the level reward.

streakExpBonuses.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the streak EXP bonus.

importInterestTags.provideJson: Provide a JSON file or paste JSON
importInterestTags.invalidShape: JSON must be an array or an object with an 'items' array
importInterestTags.dialogDescription: Upload a JSON file or paste JSON. Each item must have display_name; category, icon, description, and is_active are optional.

api.socketForbidden: Socket does not belong to caller
